title: galium humifusum var. diffusum
intro: Galium humifusum var. diffusum, also known as Wood Sorrel or Common Wood-sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems, due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Galium humifusum var. diffusum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
